# USS Academy — llms.txt
# Machine-readable site summary for AI crawlers and language models

## Organization
name: USS Academy
type: Firearms Training School
location: Winter Garden / Orlando, Florida
class_location: classes held at partner ranges across Central Florida including Saint Cloud FL
phone: 321-878-8089
email: support@ussacademy.org
website: https://www.ussacademy.org

## Lead Instructor
name: Josh Rodriguez
credentials: Florida Class K License, NRA Certified Instructor, Law Enforcement Firearms Instructor, USCCA Certified Instructor

## Services
- Concealed Weapon Permit (CWP) Classes
- Basic Firearms Safety
- Advanced Tactical Training
- NRA Certified Courses
- USCCA Courses
- Private 1-on-1 Training
- Group Classes at Your Location (Host-a-Class)
- Competitive Shooting Programs

search: yes

ai-train: no
